story-img-77a31e.query: We started Velmora with a single idea: demi-fine jewelry should feel like it was made for you — the weight, the warmth, the way it catches the light. Every piece is hand-finished in small batches, plated in 18K gold over a recycled base, and inspected before it leaves the studio. Quiet design, made to last .
